flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at William T McFatter Technical College fell 16% between 2006 and 2009 (60.1% → 50.4%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at William T McFatter Technical College rose 11% between 2005 and 2008 ($6.9k → $7.7k).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at William T McFatter Technical College are 17% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($41.7k vs $35.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at William T McFatter Technical College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (624 → 697).
